pred_reason: The contract exhibits multiple reentrancy vulnerabilities (SWC-107) through state changes occurring after external calls, particularly in the buy() function. Additionally, the use of block.difficulty and block.timestamp for randomness generation (SWC-101) creates miner-influenceable outcomes. Evidence: buy() function updates state after _buyer.send(refund) call; Multiple state-changing functions violate Checks-Effects-Interactions pattern; Randomness generation uses block.difficulty and now (block.timestamp)
